creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tagattie
Date: Fri May  8 00:11:44 UTC 2020
New revision: 534307
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/534307

Log:
  Numix is the official icon theme from the Numix Project. It is heavily
  inspired by, and based upon parts of the Elementary, Humanity and
  Gnome icon themes. Numix is designed to be used along-side an
  application icon theme like Numix Circle or Numix Square.

  WWW: https://numixproject.github.io

  PR:		245875
  Submitted by:	Vincent DEFERT <20.100@defert.com>
  Approved by:	ehaupt (mentor)

Changes:
  head/x11-themes/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/numix-icon-theme/
  head/x11-themes/numix-icon-theme/Makefile
  head/x11-themes/numix-icon-theme/distinfo
  head/x11-themes/numix-icon-theme/pkg-descr
  head/x11-themes/numix-icon-theme/pkg-plist
